ham.subject: Ticket #1234 Resolved: Payment Gateway Integration
ham.body:
Hi Rahul,

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to let you know that ticket #1234 regarding the payment gateway integration has been successfully resolved. The issue was due to a misconfiguration in the API keys, and we have updated the credentials in the repository. The changes have been merged into the main branch and are ready for QA testing.

Please pull the latest changes and run the integration tests. If you encounter any further issues, let me know.

Thanks,
Anita
Project Lead

spam.subject: Important: Immediate Action Required – Security Update
spam.body:
Dear Team,

This is to inform you that an important Zoom meeting has been scheduled for 3:00 PM today to discuss the upcoming product launch. As part of the compliance process, you must join the meeting using the following link:

<URL>

The meeting will be recorded and shared with all participants. Failure to join will result in temporary suspension of your account. Please act immediately.

Best Regards,
Prashant Kumar
Head of Operations
